creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
Is there any progress on this? As of 14.2 it is still not possible to mount a ZFS dataset as an unprivileged user in a jail (although you're allowed to create it).
Either you should not be able to create dataset in jail or you should be able to mount created dataset in jail, there is some inconsistency as this is allowed on the HOST with proper delegations ..
